businesses.name: Rice Flour Processing Unit
businesses.description: Rice flour is widely used in bakeries, snacks, dosa batter, noodles, and gluten-free products.
businesses.production_process: Clean paddy → dehusk → grind to flour → sieve → package in 1kg/5kg bags
businesses.raw_materials: Raw paddy or broken rice from local mills
businesses.export_potential: Growing demand in Middle East and Southeast Asia for gluten-free flour

businesses.name: Rice Bran Oil Extraction
businesses.description: Health-focused edible oil rich in Vitamin E and antioxidants with strong export potential.
businesses.production_process: Collect rice bran → solvent extraction → degumming → refining → bottling
businesses.raw_materials: Rice bran from local rice mills
businesses.export_potential: Export-grade demand from Japan, Korea, EU. Domestic health market growing 25% YoY

businesses.name: Puffed Rice Manufacturing
businesses.description: Low investment snack production. Murmura/puffed rice is a staple snack across India.
businesses.production_process: Soak paddy → partial cook → dry → puff in sand/machine → sieve → package
businesses.export_potential: Limited, mainly domestic street food market

businesses.name: Rice Husk Briquettes
businesses.description: Convert rice husk waste into fuel briquettes — eco-friendly alternative to firewood and coal.
businesses.production_process: Collect rice husk → dry → compress into briquettes → package
businesses.export_potential: Growing demand for biomass fuel in industrial boilers

businesses.name: Rice Straw Mushroom Cultivation
businesses.description: Use rice straw waste as substrate for oyster/button mushroom farming.
businesses.production_process: Collect straw → pasteurize → spawn → incubate → harvest in 25-30 days
businesses.export_potential: Hotels pay ₹200-400/kg. Export to Middle East growing

businesses.name: Maize-Based Animal Feed Production
businesses.description: High-nutrition poultry and cattle feed pellets from maize.
businesses.production_process: Grind maize → mix with soybean meal, vitamins, minerals → pelletize → package
businesses.raw_materials: Maize grain, soybean meal, vitamin premix
businesses.export_potential: Poultry sector growing 8-10% annually in India

businesses.name: Corn Starch Manufacturing
businesses.description: Corn starch used in textiles, paper, food, and pharmaceutical industries.
businesses.production_process: Soak maize → wet grind → separate starch → wash → dry → package
businesses.export_potential: Textile and pharma industries ensure export demand

businesses.name: Popcorn & Sweet Corn Processing
businesses.description: Flavored popcorn and frozen sweet corn are high-margin FMCG products.
businesses.production_process: Source popcorn-grade maize → pop → flavor → package in sealed bags
businesses.export_potential: Ready-to-eat popcorn segment growing 20% YoY globally

businesses.name: Turmeric Powder Processing Unit
businesses.description: Grinding, sorting, and packaging pure turmeric powder with high curcumin content.
businesses.production_process: Boil raw turmeric → dry → polish → grind → sieve → package
businesses.export_potential: India produces 80% of world's turmeric. Export to US, EU growing 18% annually

businesses.name: Curcumin Extraction Plant
businesses.description: Extract high-value curcumin for pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industries.
businesses.production_process: Extract oleoresin from turmeric → isolate curcumin via solvent extraction → purify → dry
businesses.export_potential: Global curcumin market $100M+. Purity sells at ₹3000-5000/kg

businesses.name: Turmeric-Based Cosmetics
businesses.description: Face packs, soaps, and creams using turmeric as the key Ayurvedic ingredient.
businesses.production_process: Formulate recipes → mix ingredients → mould/fill → cure → label → package
businesses.raw_materials: Turmeric extract, base oils, essential oils, packaging
businesses.export_potential: Natural beauty products growing 25% in India. Strong Ayurvedic branding potential

businesses.name: Tomato Sauce & Ketchup Unit
businesses.description: Value-added processing of tomatoes into sauce, ketchup, and puree for retail.
businesses.production_process: Wash tomatoes → pulp → cook with spices/sugar/vinegar → fill bottles → cap → label
businesses.raw_materials: Fresh tomatoes, spices, sugar, vinegar, bottles
businesses.export_potential: Indian ketchup market worth ₹2000 Cr+, growing 14% annually

businesses.name: Tomato Powder Production
businesses.description: Dehydrated tomato powder for instant soup, ready meals, and spice blends.
businesses.production_process: Slice tomatoes → dehydrate at 60°C → grind to powder → sieve → package
businesses.export_potential: Food processing industry demands consistent supply. Export to EU and US

businesses.name: Sun-Dried Tomato Export
businesses.description: Sun-dried tomatoes are a premium product in European and American cuisines.
businesses.production_process: Select firm tomatoes → halve → salt → sun-dry 5-7 days → pack in oil or vacuum-seal
businesses.raw_materials: Firm ripe tomatoes, olive oil, herbs, salt
businesses.export_potential: Premium product. European demand stable. $8-15/kg export price

businesses.name: Chili Powder & Packaging Unit
businesses.description: Sun-drying, stem-cutting, grinding, and packaging of red chili powder.
businesses.production_process: Dry red chilies → remove stems → roast lightly → grind → sieve → package
businesses.export_potential: Essential kitchen staple. Steady demand year-round

businesses.name: Chili Oleoresin Extraction
businesses.description: Extract oleoresin (capsaicin) for food coloring, pharma, and defense industries.
businesses.production_process: Dry chilies → solvent extraction → evaporate solvent → concentrate oleoresin → package
businesses.export_potential: Global capsaicin market growing. India is major exporter

businesses.name: Hot Sauce & Pickle Manufacturing
businesses.description: Artisanal hot sauces and chili pickles for gourmet and e-commerce markets.
businesses.production_process: Develop recipes → small-batch cook → fill → label → sell online and retail
businesses.export_potential: Hot sauce trend growing globally. Artisanal products command premium pricing

businesses.name: Millet Flour Processing
businesses.description: Milling ragi/jowar/bajra into flour and blending multi-grain health mixes.
businesses.production_process: Clean millets → destine → mill → blend multi-grain → sieve → package
businesses.export_potential: UN Year of Millets boosted global awareness. Health food demand surging 30%+

businesses.name: Millet-Based Ready-to-Eat Snacks
businesses.description: Cookies, rusks, namkeen, and puffs from millets for health-conscious consumers.
businesses.production_process: Mix millet flour with ingredients → mould → bake/fry → cool → package
businesses.raw_materials: Millet flour, butter, jaggery, nuts, packaging
businesses.export_potential: Millet snacks command 30-50% premium. Export to US health food stores

businesses.name: Millet-Based Malt Drinks
businesses.description: Nutritious ragi/jowar malt drink powder for children and health-conscious adults.
businesses.production_process: Roast millets → malt → blend with cocoa/jaggery/dry fruits → spray dry → pack
businesses.export_potential: Natural alternative to Horlicks/Bournvita. Parents prefer natural options

businesses.name: Cotton Ginning & Pressing Unit
businesses.description: Separate cotton fiber from seeds — essential first step in textile value chain.
businesses.production_process: Feed raw cotton → gin to separate lint → press into bales → sell to spinning mills
businesses.export_potential: India is world's 2nd largest cotton producer. Textile mills always need supply

businesses.name: Surgical Cotton Manufacturing
businesses.description: Purify raw cotton into absorbent surgical cotton for medical use.
businesses.production_process: Bleach raw cotton → wash → dry → roll into medical cotton → sterilize → pack
businesses.export_potential: Healthcare sector ensures stable demand. Export to Africa and Southeast Asia

businesses.name: Cotton Seed Oil Extraction
businesses.description: Extract edible oil from cotton seeds — byproduct of ginning with dual revenue.
businesses.production_process: Collect cotton seeds → expel oil → filter → refine → bottle. Sell cake as cattle feed
businesses.export_potential: Dual revenue: oil for cooking, de-oiled cake for animal feed

businesses.name: Jaggery Manufacturing
businesses.description: Traditional organic jaggery — healthier alternative to refined sugar.
businesses.production_process: Crush cane → boil juice → skim impurities → pour into moulds → cool → package
businesses.export_potential: Organic jaggery ₹80-150/kg. Export demand from US, UK, Middle East

businesses.name: Sugarcane Juice Parlor Chain
businesses.description: Fresh sugarcane juice kiosks with flavored variants in urban areas.
businesses.production_process: Crush fresh cane → strain → add ginger/lemon/mint → serve chilled
businesses.export_potential: Seasonal but highly profitable March-October. ₹50K-1L/month per kiosk

businesses.name: Ethanol Production Unit
businesses.description: Produce bio-ethanol from sugarcane molasses for govt-mandated fuel blending.
businesses.production_process: Ferment molasses → distill → dehydrate → store → supply to oil companies
businesses.export_potential: Govt mandated 20% ethanol blending. Guaranteed offtake from oil companies

businesses.name: Groundnut Oil Mill
businesses.description: Cold-pressed groundnut oil — premium cooking oil in South and West India.
businesses.production_process: Clean groundnuts → cold press → filter → settle → bottle → label
businesses.export_potential: Cold-pressed oils growing 35% annually. Premium ₹250-400/liter

businesses.name: Peanut Butter Manufacturing
businesses.description: Peanut butter — high-protein health food with booming fitness market demand.
businesses.production_process: Roast groundnuts → grind to paste → add salt/honey → fill jars → label
businesses.export_potential: Indian peanut butter market growing 20% annually. Fitness trend driving demand

businesses.name: Roasted & Flavored Peanuts
businesses.description: Salted, masala, and coated peanuts — India's favorite bar and travel snack.
businesses.production_process: Roast peanuts → toss with flavoring → cool → pack in pouches
businesses.raw_materials: Raw peanuts, salt, spices, oil, packaging
businesses.export_potential: Impulse-buy snack with consistent year-round domestic demand

businesses.name: Soya Milk & Tofu Manufacturing
businesses.description: Plant-based milk and tofu for the vegan and health-conscious market.
businesses.production_process: Soak soybeans → grind → filter (milk) → coagulate (tofu) → press → package
businesses.export_potential: Plant-based food market growing 25% annually. Vegan movement in metros

businesses.name: Soya Chunks Production
businesses.description: Soya chunks — India's most popular vegetarian protein source (Meal Maker).
businesses.production_process: Defatted soy flour → extrude → cut → dry → package
businesses.export_potential: Growing 15% annually. Govt nutrition programs are major buyers

businesses.name: Atta Mill (Whole Wheat Flour)
businesses.description: Chakki-ground whole wheat flour — daily necessity for every Indian household.
businesses.production_process: Clean wheat → destine → grind in chakki → sieve → package
businesses.export_potential: India consumes 90 million tonnes. Branded atta is ₹25,000 Cr market

businesses.name: Bakery & Biscuit Unit
businesses.description: Bread, biscuits, rusks, and cakes — the booming Indian bakery market.
businesses.production_process: Mix dough → mould → bake → cool → package
businesses.raw_materials: Wheat flour, sugar, butter, yeast, packaging
businesses.export_potential: Indian bakery market ₹35,000 Cr+. Growing 12% annually

businesses.name: Pasta & Noodle Manufacturing
businesses.description: Wheat-based pasta, vermicelli, and instant noodles for retail and bulk.
businesses.production_process: Mix flour → knead dough → extrude shapes → dry → package
businesses.export_potential: Indian pasta market growing 15% annually. Quick meals gaining popularity

businesses.name: Banana Chips Manufacturing
businesses.description: Kerala-style banana chips — hugely popular snack across India.
businesses.production_process: Peel raw bananas → slice thin → deep fry in coconut oil → salt → package
businesses.raw_materials: Raw bananas, coconut oil, salt, packaging
businesses.export_potential: Banana chips ₹3000 Cr market. Kerala-style has national and NRI appeal

businesses.name: Banana Fiber Extraction
businesses.description: Natural fiber from banana stems for textiles, handicrafts, and paper.
businesses.production_process: Collect pseudo-stems → extract fiber via decorticator → dry → spin
businesses.export_potential: Eco-friendly fiber demand rising. Fashion brands using banana fiber

businesses.name: Banana Powder & Baby Food
businesses.description: Dehydrated banana powder for baby food, smoothies, and baking.
businesses.production_process: Peel ripe bananas → slice → dehydrate → grind → sieve → package
businesses.export_potential: Baby food and smoothie demand growing. Natural ingredient preference

businesses.name: Virgin Coconut Oil Production
businesses.description: Cold-pressed virgin coconut oil for cooking, cosmetics, and health.
businesses.production_process: Grate coconut → extract milk → cold press → settle → filter → bottle
businesses.export_potential: VCO market growing 10% globally. Premium ₹500-800/liter

businesses.name: Coconut Water Bottling
businesses.description: Packaged tender coconut water — natural isotonic health drink.
businesses.production_process: Open tender coconuts → extract water → pasteurize → fill tetra packs → label
businesses.export_potential: Packaged coconut water growing 15% annually globally

businesses.name: Coir Products Manufacturing
businesses.description: Doormats, ropes, grow bags from coconut coir — eco-friendly products.
businesses.production_process: Extract coir from husks → ret → spin → weave/press into products → package
businesses.export_potential: Eco-friendly demand rising. Grow bags popular in horticulture. Export to EU

businesses.name: Mango Pulp & Puree Unit
businesses.description: Process ripe mangoes into pulp/puree for juice, ice cream, confectionery.
businesses.production_process: Wash mangoes → peel → pulp → pasteurize → fill aseptic bags → store
businesses.export_potential: India exports ₹500 Cr+ mango pulp annually

businesses.name: Mango Pickle & Chutney
businesses.description: Traditional Indian mango pickle (aachar) and sweet mango chutney.
businesses.production_process: Cut raw mangoes → mix with spices, mustard oil → mature → jar → label
businesses.raw_materials: Raw green mangoes, mustard oil, spices, jars
businesses.export_potential: Indian pickle market ₹3000 Cr. Home-style brands trending

businesses.name: Dried Mango (Amchur) Powder
businesses.description: Dried raw mango powder — essential souring agent in Indian cooking.
businesses.production_process: Slice raw mangoes → sun-dry 7-10 days → grind to powder → sieve → package
businesses.export_potential: Staple spice in North India. Consistent demand from spice blenders

businesses.name: Potato Chips & Wafers Unit
businesses.description: Fried and baked potato chips — India's largest packaged snack segment.
businesses.production_process: Peel → slice → wash → fry → de-oil → flavor → nitrogen-flush pack
businesses.export_potential: Indian snack market ₹40,000 Cr. Chips are the largest segment

businesses.name: French Fries Processing
businesses.description: Frozen french fries for restaurants, QSR chains, and retail.
businesses.production_process: Cut potatoes → blanch → par-fry → IQF freeze → package
businesses.export_potential: QSR chains growing rapidly. Frozen fries demand growing 18% annually

businesses.name: Dehydrated Onion Flakes & Powder
businesses.description: Dehydrated onion for instant food, spice blends, and export market.
businesses.production_process: Peel → slice → dehydrate at 55-65°C → grind/flake → package
businesses.export_potential: India exports ₹1000 Cr+ dehydrated onion. Major export hub: Mahuva, Gujarat

businesses.name: Onion Cold Storage Business
businesses.description: Store onions during glut, sell during shortage for 2-3x returns.
businesses.production_process: Buy onions at ₹5-10/kg → store 3-4 months → sell at ₹30-60/kg
businesses.export_potential: Strategic storage guarantees high returns during price spikes

businesses.name: Specialty Tea Blending & Packaging
businesses.description: Blend and package premium teas — masala chai, green tea, herbal tea.
businesses.production_process: Source CTC/orthodox tea → blend with cardamom/ginger/tulsi → pack in premium boxes
businesses.raw_materials: Tea leaves, spices, tea bags, packaging
businesses.export_potential: Specialty tea market growing 25%. Consumers moving to premium tea

businesses.name: Kombucha & Fermented Tea
businesses.description: Probiotic fermented tea — the hottest wellness beverage trend.
businesses.production_process: Brew sweetened tea → ferment with SCOBY → flavor with fruits → bottle → refrigerate
businesses.raw_materials: Tea, sugar, SCOBY culture, fruit flavors, bottles
businesses.export_potential: Kombucha in India nascent but growing 40%+ annually. First-mover advantage

businesses.name: Artisanal Coffee Roasting
businesses.description: Small-batch specialty coffee roasting for cafes and direct consumers.
businesses.production_process: Source green beans → roast in small batches → rest/degas → grind (optional) → pack
businesses.export_potential: Indian specialty coffee growing 30% annually. Cafe culture booming

businesses.name: Cold Brew Coffee Bottling
businesses.description: Ready-to-drink cold brew coffee — premium RTD segment.
businesses.production_process: Coarsely grind → steep in cold water 12-24 hours → filter → bottle → refrigerate
businesses.export_potential: RTD coffee fastest-growing beverage category. Urban millennials driving adoption

businesses.name: Dal Mill (Pulse Splitting Unit)
businesses.description: Clean, grade, dehusk, and split whole pulses into dal — India's daily protein.
businesses.production_process: Clean pulses → grade → dehusk → split → polish → package
businesses.export_potential: India consumes 25 million tonnes pulses. Branded dal growing 15%

businesses.name: Papad & Snacks from Pulses
businesses.description: Urad dal papad, moong dal bhujia — staple Indian meal accompaniments.
businesses.production_process: Soak, grind pulse dough → roll into papads → sun-dry → package
businesses.export_potential: Papad ₹5000 Cr market. Lijjat model proves community scalability

businesses.name: Sprouted Pulse Products
businesses.description: Sprouted moong/chana for salads, health food, and ready-to-eat packs.
businesses.production_process: Soak pulses → sprout in controlled humidity → wash → pack fresh → deliver daily
businesses.export_potential: Health food trend. Gyms/fitness enthusiasts are key buyers

businesses.name: Cold Storage Unit
businesses.description: Multi-crop cold storage facility to reduce post-harvest losses.
businesses.production_process: Receive produce → grade → store at optimal temperature → dispatch on demand
businesses.export_potential: India loses 30% produce post-harvest. Critical infrastructure need

businesses.name: Organic Vegetable Farming
businesses.description: Chemical-free vegetable farming with organic certification for premium pricing.
businesses.production_process: Prepare organic beds → plant seasonal vegetables → organic pest control → harvest → pack
businesses.export_potential: Organic food market growing 25% in India. Consumers pay 30-50% premium

businesses.name: Solar-Powered Irrigation System
businesses.description: Install and maintain solar pump irrigation systems for farming communities.
businesses.production_process: Survey → design system → install solar panels + pump → connect to field → maintain
businesses.export_potential: Govt pushing 30 million solar pumps. 60% subsidy available under PM KUSUM

businesses.name: Hydroponic Farming
businesses.description: Soilless farming in controlled environments for premium vegetables and herbs.
businesses.production_process: Set up growing beds → plant seedlings → manage nutrient solution → harvest → supply to premium buyers
businesses.raw_materials: Seeds, nutrient solutions, growing media, electricity
businesses.export_potential: Urban farming trend. Hotels/restaurants pay premium for fresh, local, pesticide-free produce

businesses.name: Dairy Processing Unit
businesses.description: Process raw milk into paneer, ghee, curd, buttermilk, and flavored drinks.
businesses.production_process: Collect milk → pasteurize → separate cream → make paneer/ghee/curd → package
businesses.raw_materials: Raw milk from local dairy farmers
businesses.export_potential: India is world's largest milk producer. Processed dairy growing 15% annually

businesses.name: Food Processing Startup
businesses.description: Ready-to-eat and ready-to-cook meal kits using local agricultural produce.
businesses.production_process: Source local produce → prep ingredients → cook/semi-cook → package → distribute
businesses.raw_materials: Fresh vegetables, spices, packaging, dry ingredients
businesses.export_potential: Ready-to-eat market growing 20% annually. Cloud kitchen model scalable

businesses.name: Vermicompost Production
businesses.description: Organic fertilizer from agricultural waste using earthworms.
businesses.production_process: Collect agri-waste → shred → add earthworms → composting 45-60 days → sieve → package
businesses.export_potential: Organic farming adoption driving demand. Government buying for distribution
